name: Do I need a lawyer for my minor work sprain in Bountiful?
description: Optional for minor; yes if denied or complex.[5]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my minor work sprain in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: Optional for minor; yes if denied or complex.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not always for simple cases, but recommended if denied, complicated, or valuable benefits at stake.[5] Many work contingency—no upfront fees.[5] Key factors: Insurer delays/tactics; retaliation risks; third-party potential.[5] Practical guidance: Handle reporting yourself initially, but call if issues arise to maximize benefits without cost risk. Free consults assess need.
